description: Private banking ultra-high-net-worth individual with AUM of $15M, assets spanning multiple jurisdictions, Enhanced Due Diligence completed
parsed_text:
PRIVATE BANKING — ENHANCED DUE DILIGENCE PROFILE
Customer Name: Claudette Beaumont-Archer
Customer Type: Individual (Private Banking)
Date of Birth: 1961-11-03   SSN: XXX-XX-2207
Address (Primary US): 21 Harbor View Drive, Greenwich, CT 06830, USA
Address (Secondary): Villa Rosamont, 12 Chemin des Crêtes, Geneva, Switzerland CH-1206
Phone (US): (203) 555-0115   Phone (CH): +41-22-555-0198
Email: c.beaumont@example.com
Occupation: Private Investor / Retired Board Member (Beaumont Pharmaceuticals Inc)
Source of Funds: Proceeds from partial sale of equity stake in Beaumont Pharmaceuticals (2019, $38M net), ongoing investment portfolio income, real estate rental income (Switzerland and France)
Expected Monthly Activity: $620,000
Assets Under Management (AUM): $15,000,000 (on-boarded to private banking program)

MULTI-JURISDICTIONAL PROFILE
US Person: Yes (USC)
Additional Tax Residency: Switzerland (Swiss Resident Permit B)
FATCA Status: US Person — W-9 collected.
Foreign Accounts / Assets: Swiss brokerage (Credit Suisse successor entity), French rental property (Provence), Cayman Islands private equity fund interest (LP interest ~$1.2M).

IDENTITY DOCUMENTS
ID Type: Passport   ID Number: US-XXXX5512   Expiration: 2030-07-14
Secondary: Swiss Permit B — CHPB-XXXX3301

SCREENING RESULTS
OFAC / SDN: Clear.
PEP Check: No PEP status. Ms. Beaumont-Archer is not a current or former government official. Former non-executive board member of private pharmaceutical company; not subject to PEP designation.
Adverse Media: Reviewed. One 2018 Bloomberg article referencing the Beaumont Pharmaceuticals IPO regulatory review — resolved favorably; no adverse findings.
Swiss/Cayman Jurisdiction Assessment: Switzerland and Cayman Islands flagged as enhanced-monitoring jurisdictions per internal policy. Documented mitigation: Swiss assets held at licensed bank; Cayman LP interest is in regulated fund.

EDD ACTIONS COMPLETED
1. Source of wealth letter received and reviewed against publicly available IPO filings confirming $38M proceeds.
2. Cayman Islands fund subscription documents reviewed.
3. Tax attestations (W-9, Swiss tax declaration) on file.
4. Relationship Manager attestation completed.
5. Senior private banking officer approval: Granted.
CDD Level: Enhanced
Risk Rating: High
Review Date: 2025-12-01   Reviewer: Robert Fairweather

expected_json.occupation_or_business: Private Investor / Retired Board Member (Beaumont Pharmaceuticals Inc)
expected_json.source_of_funds: Proceeds from partial sale of equity stake in Beaumont Pharmaceuticals, investment portfolio income, real estate rental income
